title: steirodiscus capillaceus
intro: Steirodiscus capillaceus is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the African bush tea or red bush tea. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Steirodiscus capillaceus include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often infused in hot water to make a tea, which is also used as a natural remedy for various ailments, including hypertension and arthritis.
